{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211422163FBDBF3924FC776CDD78\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600072728365876030","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很甜的，嗯对，三人组这个好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769532799,"group_id":"7565357174218574910","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写的小说很烂，所以不喜勿喷。我是困困大王，想写小说的风还是吹到了学校…（苦命学生党\n玩异头和塔罗牌，小红书同名","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/rYeJciQvPjcj3pka1Lnc0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/581f95839a6e406babadc102b0a1dd23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776617760\u0026x-signature=hfvMPKr2fkCZUEizavf5XhuYnzA%3D","user_id":"609561640444313","user_name":"鱿鱼船长困困大王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"609561640444313","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7565357174218574910","book_info":{"abstract":"主角李源锡跟队长余尘桉与队友沏哲寒组成精英小队，一起破案，李源锡经历过车祸，有后遗症（说白了就是脆皮小法医）。还有就是一切人设以本书为准，罪踪有点崩人设。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9ebf3ff5c604680c58be7f77365ff3cb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鱿鱼船长困困大王","author_id":"","book_id":"7565357174218574910","book_name":"犯罪真凶","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":539,\"name\":\"悬疑脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539\u0026name=悬疑脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"
